channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ‘The world feels unpredictable’: I’m 56. My husband is 64. Our mortgage costs $17K a month. Do we pay it off?
item.description: “We paid $3.1 million for the house and owe $1.3 million on the loan.”

item.title: Why a 40-year Wall Street veteran is telling clients to sell everything American
item.description: Andy Constan says the rest of the world now offers more opportunities.

item.title: My small church wants to sell some property, but the trustees can’t agree on what to do with the money
item.description: Investing for an entity other than yourself can be tricky, especially if you’re doing it as a group.

item.title: ‘I have a moral and ethical conundrum’: My husband was killed by a careless driver. I received $2 million. What do I owe my stepdaughter?
item.description: “As the children grew, life became more complicated.”

item.title: Moderna got the FDA to change its mind and review its flu vaccine after some concessions
item.description: Moderna’s stock was surging after the FDA said it would review the biotech’s flu-vaccine candidate, a week after it had refused to do so.

item.title: Amazon is oversold. Traders can take advantage of the weakness using this options trade
item.description: Amazon's recent weakness appears to reflect sentiment fatigue rather than a deterioration in business quality.

item.title: Jefferies sees this online casino soaring more than 75%
item.description: The investment firm reiterated the online casino and sports betting company at a buy rating.

item.title: This software stock was hit hard on AI disruption fears. Now it’s proving detractors wrong
item.description: Analysts maintained their long-term bullishness on Cadence Design Systems, calling fears of AI disruption overblown.

item.title: Mizuho upgrades Palantir, says AI demand makes recent sell-off ‘unjustifiable’
item.description: Mizuho sees shares of Palantir rallying 47% from here.

item.title: Buy this AI infrastructure stock that has doubled in the past year, says Compass Point
item.description: The firm initiated the artificial intelligence infrastructure stock with a buy rating.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...

item.title: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) Soars on Promising Inflammation Drug Data
item.description: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) stock surges over 42% on positive Phase 1 data for MRT-8102, showing profound reductions in inflammation marker hsCRP. ...
